_comment: JMS/JMR unity+-1%/2% FULL production (2026-07-22): all 87 systematics, to replace the arc_r2 pythia pkls once the minimal comparison is understood. Identical running conditions to zjet_pythia_all_minimal_rho_r2_casa2gb_allsyst.json; the physics change is corrections.py jmssf/jmrsf ported to the UL SoftDropJMSJMRULRun2 unity tables. Stage outputs into a fresh unfold input dir -- filenames collide with the arc_r2 pkls.
